title: Job Opening Category Manager at Zappfresh Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Zappfresh Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh Advisory Limited:
Zappfresh Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh Advisory Limited!
